title: De novo designed bifunctional proteins for targeted protein degradation
summary: Authors design de novo bifunctional proteins capable of targeting and mediating degradation of specific protein substrates, extending the toolkit beyond conventional small-molecule PROTACs toward fully biological degraders.
analysis_notes: Analysis based on article title only; no abstract or full text was provided in the source page markup. bioRxiv listing pages show titles and author lists but not abstracts — actual scientific findings, methods, or validation data are unavailable for verification.
